summary: A phenomenally praised West LA show, though the review offers no details on recording source or audio quality.
review: The reviewer rates this performance a perfect five stars, calling it monumental and placing the band in a unique creative zone. No specific comments are made about the soundboard, audience mix, or individual songs, leaving the technical quality of the recording unclear.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.
